summary: charness-owned Slack thread gather runtime used by the public gather skill.

detect.failure_hint: Provide `node`, `jq`, and `perl` before using the Slack gather runtime.

healthcheck.failure_hint: The local Slack gather runtime dependencies exist but look broken.

readiness_checks.summary: Slack gather runtime shell dependencies are available.
commands: command -v node >/dev/null && command -v jq >/dev/null && command -v perl >/dev/null
readiness_checks.failure_hint: Install or expose `node`, `jq`, and `perl` before using Slack gather.

config_layers.summary: Prefer a host-mediated Slack capability grant when available.
Fall back to `SLACK_BOT_TOKEN` in ordinary local operator setups.
The operator may still need to add the bot to the workspace or target channel.

version_expectation.constraint: Prefer the checked-in charness Slack gather runtime.

host_notes: This is charness-owned runtime, not an external plugin dependency.
Consumer repos should provide capability access, not reimplement the Slack export scripts.
